heartpieces.description: Bring all seven cuccos to the pen in Kakariko Village as a child. After completing the task, speak to the Cucco Lady to receive a heart piece.
Use the Boomerang to grab the heart piece spinning on the rotating platform inside the windmill.
Play Dampé's Grave-digging Tour as a child. Keep paying him until he digs up a heart piece from one of the soft soil spots.
After completing the Forest Temple as an adult, race Dampé in the graveyard and beat his time to receive a heart piece.
As an adult, use the Hookshot to reach the top of the lookout tower in Kakariko Village. From there, leap across to the roof of the house below, where a man will give you a heart piece.
As a child, find the bombable wall on the trail leading up Death Mountain. Inside the cave is a heart piece waiting for you.
In Death Mountain Crater, climb the ladder leading to a small ledge near the entrance to the Fire Temple. A heart piece is located here.

heartpieces.location: Death Mountain Crater - Bolero of Fire
heartpieces.description: After learning the Bolero of Fire, warp to Death Mountain Crater as an adult. Use the Hookshot to reach the heart piece on the nearby ledge.
Stop the rolling Goron inside Goron City by using a Bomb, and he will reward you with a heart piece.
Plant a Magic Bean in the soft soil by Zora's River as a child. Return as an adult and ride the platform to a heart piece.
Play all of the different Ocarina songs (except the Sun's Song) for the frogs on the log by Zora's River. Each song will reward you with rupees, and eventually a heart piece.
After playing the Ocarina songs for the frogs, participate in a bug-catching mini-game where you hit the correct frogs as butterflies pass by. Successfully complete it to earn a heart piece.
As an adult, after defeating Morpha and unfreezing Zora's Domain, climb the frozen waterfall and jump across the platforms to obtain a heart piece.
In the Fishing Pond, catch a fish that weighs at least 10 pounds as a child or 15 pounds as an adult to earn a heart piece from the pond owner.
Use the Iron Boots and Zora Tunic to sink to the bottom of Lake Hylia as an adult, where you'll find a heart piece inside a small crate.
After playing the Scarecrow's Song as an adult, use the Hookshot on the scarecrow to reach a heart piece on the platform above Lake Hylia.
Jump off the broken bridge in Gerudo Valley and float down the river. Behind the waterfall is a ledge with a heart piece.
After acquiring the Longshot as an adult, return to Gerudo Valley and use it to reach the heart piece inside a crate on the far side of the valley.
Score at least 1,000 points in the horseback archery mini-game at the Gerudo Fortress as an adult to receive a heart piece.
In the Haunted Wasteland, climb the structure at the center of the area. Use the Longshot to reach a heart piece on top.
Plant a Magic Bean in the soft soil near the entrance to the Spirit Temple. Return as an adult and ride the platform to a heart piece.
After learning the Requiem of Spirit, return to the Desert Colossus as a child and use a Bomb to blow up a cracked wall. Inside is a heart piece.
Play Saria's Song for the Skull Kid in the Lost Woods to receive a heart piece.
In the Lost Woods, complete the slingshot target practice mini-game by hitting the bullseye three times in a row to earn a heart piece.
Plant a Magic Bean in the soft soil patch in the Lost Woods near the entrance to the Sacred Forest Meadow. Return as an adult and ride the platform to a heart piece.
As an adult, hunt down and capture all 10 Big Poes in Hyrule Field. Return them to the Poe Collector in the ruins near the Castle Town market to receive a heart piece.
Win the Super Cucco game in Lon Lon Ranch by finding Talon’s three special chickens to receive a heart piece.
In the back of the ranch, climb the tower and jump off the top to land on the silo roof, where you will find a heart piece.
Win the random Treasure Box game in Castle Town Market at night using the Lens of Truth to correctly open all the boxes and receive a heart piece.
Win a round of Bombchu Bowling to receive a heart piece as one of the potential prizes.
Score a perfect 10 out of 10 in the Shooting Gallery in Castle Town as a child to win a heart piece.
Light all the torches in Zora’s Domain as a child using Din’s Fire to make a chest appear containing a heart piece.
In the Ice Cavern, find the heart piece located on a ledge in one of the rooms filled with spinning ice blades.
Return to Dodongo’s Cavern as an adult with the Scarecrow's Song and Longshot. Use them to reach a heart piece on a high ledge in the main room.
After obtaining the Boomerang in Jabu-Jabu’s Belly, use it to grab the heart piece from a ledge in the room with the moving platforms.
Before entering Ganon’s Castle, use the Hover Boots and Longshot to reach a hidden platform outside with a heart piece.
